title: Duplication Furnace
description: A special furnace that doubles every item you smelt, no exceptions!
body:
## 🔥 Duplication Furnace

**Duplication Furnace** is a simple but powerful Minecraft mod by **Shirjeel_plays** that lets you smelt **any** item and get **double the output** — no rules, no restrictions, just pure duplication fun! Perfect for speedrunning resource gathering or making survival a little more chaotic.

> 🎮 **Fun fact:** This mod is also used by **GamerFleet** in his Minecraft worlds!

### ✨ Features
- Works with **all smeltable items** — ores, food, blocks, anything.
- Gives **x2 output** every time you smelt.
- Survival-friendly crafting recipe.
- Unique enchanted-glint texture so you’ll never confuse it with a normal furnace.
- Supports Fabric Loader **1.20.1** with Fabric API.

### 🛠 Crafting Recipe
Place a **Furnace** in the center of a crafting table and surround it with **Iron Ingots**.

### 📷 Media
Check out my YouTube for showcases and tutorials:  
▶ **[Shirjeel_plays YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Shirjeel_plays)**

### 📦 Installation
1. Download the latest `.jar` file from the [Releases](https://github.com/ShirjeelPlays/DuplicationFurnace/releases/tag/v1.0.0) page.
2. Place it in your Minecraft `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game with Fabric Loader.

### ⚠ Compatibility
- **Minecraft**: 1.20.1
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric
- **Required**: Fabric API

---

**Made with ❤️ by [Shirjeel_plays](https://www.youtube.com/@Shirjeel_plays)**
